question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week.

assessment.note: Payments shipped clean, which suggests some situational clarity, but 'coasting a bit this week' is a mild engagement dip; also volunteered a payments thread worth following.

new_queue.label: Coasting this week
new_queue.name: You said you're 'coasting a bit this week' — what's driving that?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Recognition gap
new_queue.name: What felt missing in how the refactor was recognised?

new_queue.label: Repeatable wins
new_queue.name: What should we make sure to repeat from that refactor on the next hard project?

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
